positive: A seamless, highly detailed symmetrical mandala-style illustration depicting a mystical woodland scene. The central focus is a stylized bioluminescent forest clearing, with glowing mushroom clusters and stylized ancient root systems forming a hexagonal pattern. Integrate elements like crystalline leaves, geometric forest silhouettes, and crescent moon glyphs interwoven with elegant vine work. The style should be a fusion of Art Deco geometry and modern nature illustration, utilizing bold outlines, solid color blocks, and high contrast. Color palette: deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, gold accents, and ethereal white bioluminescence. Composition must be perfectly centered and highly repeatable, designed specifically for apparel printing. Vector illustration, flat graphic design, clean lines, maximalist symmetry.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, blurry, artifact, smudge, low detail, noisy, gradient shading, photorealism, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, poor composition
